title: The J. M. Smucker (SJM) Banks on Pricing Efforts & Strategies
text: The J. M. Smucker (SJM) benefits from its positive net price realization across all segments. The company is also progressing well by focusing on its core strategies.

title: J.M. Smucker: A Tasty Defensive Stock With a 2.6% Dividend
text: Backed by iconic brands like Jif and Smucker's, the company has been a pillar of reliable financial growth since it went public in 1959. In the last decade, it has increased its cash dividend at a 7% annualized rate.
